assets/ directory must be copied into build/ or served from project root — build/ directory only contains generated HTML.

known_issues.template_tags_in_base: FIXED 2026-06-01 — engine supports {{ content }}, {{ title }}, {{ description }}, {{ slug }} tokens. All four active in base.html. No other token types supported — no Jinja2, no {% %} tags.
known_issues.includes_not_rendered: FIXED 2026-05-25 — navigation and footer inlined into base.html. _includes/ directory retained but not used by engine.
known_issues.assets_not_in_build: assets/ directory is not copied to build/ automatically — serve from project root or copy manually
known_issues.port_clash: always check port 8000 is free before serving — build only and refresh if server already running
known_issues.assets_build_sync: assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build — cp -r assets/ build/assets/ from each site root
known_issues.body_content_full_html: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML documents (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body> tags). Strip to <main> contents only. Full documents cause double header/footer when wrapped by base.html. Fix: re.search(r"<main[^>]*>(.*?)</main>", body, re.DOTALL)
known_issues.jekyll_site_source_of_truth: Where a matching Jekyll source exists at /home/chubert/<PROJECT>/_site/, use compiled _site HTML as body_content source of truth. Extract <main> contents only. Never use AI-rewritten content when compiled source exists.
known_issues.github_secret_name: GitHub secret MUST be named SSH_PRIVATE_KEY — workflow references secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Any other name causes Permission denied on rsync.
known_issues.lfs_checkout: pages.json tracked via Git LFS — workflow checkout must include lfs: true or build fails with empty JSON error.
known_issues.build_script: build.py must exist in repo root — GitHub Actions runner calls python3 build.py directly.
known_issues.yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml — always use a separate build.py script to avoid YAML syntax errors.
known_issues.base_html_jekyll_tags: FIXED 2026-05-25 — removed all Jekyll tags from base.html. site.title, site.baseurl, prepend filters, block/endblock all replaced. Navigation and footer inlined directly.
known_issues.missing_js_assets: cookieconsent.umd.js and cookie-init.js referenced in base.html but do not exist in assets/js/ — removed references from base.html on 2026-05-25. CSS only retained.
known_issues.homepage_slug: Engine builds index slug as build/index/index.html — must be manually copied to build/index.html after every build: cp build/index/index.html build/index.html
known_issues.head_styles_in_jekyll: Some Jekyll pages store CSS in <head> <style> blocks rather than inline — extractor must pull <style> block from <head> AND strip nav/footer from body. Affects pages using custom layouts without <main> tags. Fix: extract style block separately and prepend to body content.
known_issues.contact_hero_inline_styles: Contact page hero styles are inline in pages.json body_content — not in main.css. min-height, gradient and text alignment must be edited via pages.json.
known_issues.form_fetch_redirect: Contact form uses JS fetch — PHP header redirect ignored. Redirect must be handled via window.location.href in the fetch .then() block in pages.json body_content.
known_issues.sitemap_exclude_slugs: Sitemap generator must exclude template slugs: footer, navigation, cta, location, service-location and empty slugs. index slug must map to / not /index/.
known_issues.meta_description_hardcoded: FIXED 2026-06-01 — engine now supports {{ description }} token. base.html must use {{ description }} in meta description tag. Pages without description field fall back to default Cumbria/North Lancashire description.
known_issues.iframe_missing_title: FIXED 2026-06-01 — title attribute added to all Google Maps iframes across 793 pages in pages.json. Title: Map showing Alma Enterprises clearance service location.
known_issues.missing_favicon: FIXED 2026-06-01 — favicon.ico created in brand blue #002D62, deployed to httpdocs/ and referenced in base.html.

assets.js_files: none — cookieconsent JS missing, references removed from base.html

mandatory_session_workflow: 1. READ this Master Report in full before any action
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run before EVERY risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. Commit and push only after local build verified clean
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git reset --hard HEAD~1
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.github_actions: build-only — NO rsync in deploy.yml — all deploys are manual rsync from local machine
ai_rules: NEVER modify files inside ./build/ — fully overwritten on every build
NEVER rewrite build.py from scratch — targeted edits only
NEVER run sed/perl/regex on build/ files
NEVER commit directly to main without human confirmation
NEVER guess paths or filenames — read Master Report first
NEVER deploy via GitHub Actions rsync — manual rsync only
NEVER leave send.php redirecting anywhere other than /thank-you/
NEVER delete fields from Master Report — append only
ALWAYS read Master Report in full before any bash command
ALWAYS snapshot before every risky change
ALWAYS verify changes with a read-back command before building
ALWAYS batch fact-finding commands into a single paste
ALWAYS confirm best practice and no guessing with every command
Content changes go in data/pages.json only
Layout changes go in theme/base.html only if unavoidable
build.py must generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml on every build
Homepage slug rule: after every build copy build/{homepage_slug}/index.html to build/index.html
gitignore_rules: key.json — GSC service account credentials — never commit
snapshots/ — local snapshots only — never commit
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.meta_locked_rule: NEVER overwrite title or description on pages where meta_locked is true in pages.json. Always check for meta_locked before running any systemic description or title update script.

session_workflow.description: Mandatory workflow for every AI session
session_workflow.before_any_work: Read Master_Report.json in full — no exceptions
session_workflow.before_risky_change: bash snapshot.sh "description" — snapshots all critical files
session_workflow.restore_from_snapshot: bash restore.sh snapshots/TIMESTAMP_label — restores all critical files
session_workflow.session_end: Commit with descriptive message, push to GitHub, update Master Report changelog
session_workflow.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git reset --hard HEAD~1
ai_mandatory_rules: Read Master Report before any work begins
Never commit directly to main during a session without human confirmation
Never make changes without telling the human exactly what will change first
Never run sed, perl, or regex on build/ files
Never rewrite build.py — targeted edits only
Never guess — always verify from disk
Batch all fact-finding into single commands

recovery.description: Full site recovery from scratch — two commands only
recovery.note: All assets, content, and build logic are in the repo. pages.json tracked via Git LFS — ensure lfs: true on checkout.

ai_incident_log.description: Permanent log of AI errors on this project — read before every session

incidents.incident: key.json accidentally committed to git — GSC service account credentials exposed in commit 8ab40f0. Resolved via git filter-branch, key removed from all history, force pushed clean.
incidents.prevention: Always add sensitive key files to .gitignore before running git add -A. Never commit files matching *.json from project root without checking contents first.

ai_incident_log.permanent_fix: AI must read this entire Master Report before generating any bash commands. No assumptions. No guessing. Verify everything from disk.

gsc_audit_2026_06_14.status: COMPLETE — all critical issues fixed 2026-06-14. Pending deploy.

critical.issue: Homepage canonical mismatch — user canonical resolves to /index/ but Google canonical is / — slug token in base.html must resolve to / for homepage

build.py does not replace {{ title }}, {{ description }}, or {{ slug }} tokens — only {{ content }} is replaced. Every page on the live site has literal {{ title }} in <title> tag except where Plesk/server is caching old builds. Confirmed: services/loft-clearance/ has empty <title>.
critical.status: FIXED 2026-06-14 — build.py now replaces {{ title }}, {{ description }}, {{ slug }}, {{ content }} for all 908 pages

critical.issue: Homepage canonical outputs /index/ not / on live site. base.html uses {{ slug }}/ — when slug is index this renders as /index/. build.py must output / when slug is index for both canonical and og:url tokens.
critical.status: FIXED 2026-06-14 — build.py outputs / when slug is index. Confirmed on live build.

critical.issue: house-clearance-windermere is a confirmed live 404 — both with and without trailing slash. Page is receiving GSC clicks. Must be added to pages.json or redirected.
critical.status: FIXED 2026-06-14 — redirect page added to pages.json, meta refresh and JS redirect to /services/house-clearance/windermere/

critical.issue: attic-clearance-hayton is a confirmed live 404 — both with and without trailing slash. Page is receiving GSC clicks. Must be added to pages.json or redirected.

critical.issue: build.py does not generate sitemap.xml or robots.txt. Live versions are legacy files from a previous deploy. After next build and rsync they will be wiped. sitemap.xml and robots.txt generation must be added to build.py before next deploy.
critical.status: FIXED 2026-06-14 — build.py now generates sitemap.xml (908 URLs) and robots.txt on every build

critical.issue: /index/ is a live duplicate page with corrupted meta — description reads 'House and commercial clearance services in Index' — slug token leaking into description template treating 'index' as a location name. Live on server now, Google is seeing it.
critical.status: FIXED 2026-06-14 — empty slug excluded from build via EXCLUDED_SLUGS in build.py. Homepage builds from index slug only.

critical.issue: Sitemap is a legacy file from previous deploy — not generated by build.py. Will be wiped on next rsync deploy unless sitemap generation is added to build.py first. Sitemap correctly uses / for homepage but canonical says /index/ — live contradiction.
critical.status: FIXED 2026-06-14 — build.py now generates sitemap.xml on every build. Legacy file will be replaced on next deploy.

services/loft-clearance/ is unknown to Google — never crawled. Page exists and returns 200 on live server. May not be in sitemap or internally linked.

Expected: Indexed should begin climbing from 0 toward 910 as Google recrawls. If still 0 after 2 weeks, investigate crawl budget and internal linking.
sitemap_recheck.gsc_check_command:
cd /home/chubert/omni-builder/sites/site_alma && python3 - <<'GSCEOF'
from googleapiclient.discovery import build
from google.oauth2 import service_account
creds = service_account.Credentials.from_service_account_file('key.json', scopes=['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/webmasters.readonly'])
service = build('searchconsole', 'v1', credentials=creds)
resp = service.sitemaps().list(siteUrl='https://alma-enterprises.co.uk/').execute()
for s in resp.get('sitemap', []):
    for c in s.get('contents', []):
        print(f'Submitted: {c.get("submitted")}  Indexed: {c.get("indexed")}')
GSCEOF
